'''ngongathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:keelless|keelless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-ng-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:keelless|keelless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngongathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngongathithi|ngongathithi]] || [[word:ngongathiji|ngongathiji]] || [[word:ngongathishi|ngongathishi]] || [[word:ngongathiki|ngongathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngongathuthuthu|ngongathuthuthu]] || [[word:ngongathujuju|ngongathujuju]] || [[word:ngongathushushu|ngongathushushu]] || [[word:ngongathukuku|ngongathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngongathuthu|ngongathuthu]] || [[word:ngongathuju|ngongathuju]] || [[word:ngongathushu|ngongathushu]] || [[word:ngongathuku|ngongathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngongathufthuf|ngongathufthuf]] || [[word:ngongathufjuf|ngongathufjuf]] || [[word:ngongathufshuf|ngongathufshuf]] || [[word:ngongathufkuf|ngongathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngongathethe|ngongathethe]] || [[word:ngongatheje|ngongatheje]] || [[word:ngongatheshe|ngongatheshe]] || [[word:ngongatheke|ngongatheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngongathothotho|ngongathothotho]] || [[word:ngongathojojo|ngongathojojo]] || [[word:ngongathoshosho|ngongathoshosho]] || [[word:ngongathokoko|ngongathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngongathotho|ngongathotho]] || [[word:ngongathojo|ngongathojo]] || [[word:ngongathosho|ngongathosho]] || [[word:ngongathoko|ngongathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngongathofthof|ngongathofthof]] || [[word:ngongathofjof|ngongathofjof]] || [[word:ngongathofshof|ngongathofshof]] || [[word:ngongathofkof|ngongathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngongathĂŻfthĂŻf|ngongathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngongathĂŻfjĂŻf|ngongathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngongathĂŻfshĂŻf|ngongathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngongathĂŻfkĂŻf|ngongathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngongathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|ngongathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngongathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|ngongathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngongathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|ngongathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngongathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|ngongathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngongathĂŻfthĂŻf|ngongathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngongathĂŻfjĂŻf|ngongathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngongathĂŻfshĂŻf|ngongathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngongathĂŻfkĂŻf|ngongathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngongathĂŻfthĂŻf|ngongathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngongathĂŻfjĂŻf|ngongathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngongathĂŻfshĂŻf|ngongathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngongathĂŻfkĂŻf|ngongathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngongathĂŠthĂŠ|ngongathĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ngongathĂŠjĂŠ|ngongathĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ngongathĂŠshĂŠ|ngongathĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ngongathĂŠkĂŠ|ngongathĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngongathathatha|ngongathathatha]] || [[word:ngongathajaja|ngongathajaja]] || [[word:ngongathashasha|ngongathashasha]] || [[word:ngongathakaka|ngongathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngongathatha|ngongathatha]] || [[word:ngongathaja|ngongathaja]] || [[word:ngongathasha|ngongathasha]] || [[word:ngongathaka|ngongathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngongathafthaf|ngongathafthaf]] || [[word:ngongathafjaf|ngongathafjaf]] || [[word:ngongathafshaf|ngongathafshaf]] || [[word:ngongathafkaf|ngongathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngongathasha|ngongathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngongathshĂ«sha|ngongathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngongathrosha|ngongathrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngongathmusha|ngongathmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngongathyasha|ngongathyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongongathnkshĂ«sha|gongongathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongongathnkrosha|gongongathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongongathnkmusha|gongongathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongongathnkyasha|gongongathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngongangathasha|ngongangathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngongangathshĂ«sha|ngongangathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngongangathrosha|ngongangathrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngongangathmusha|ngongangathmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngongangathyasha|ngongangathyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongongangathnkshĂ«sha|gongongangathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongongangathnkrosha|gongongangathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongongangathnkmusha|gongongangathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongongangathnkyasha|gongongangathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngengĂŠthasha|ngengĂŠthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngengĂŠthshĂ«sha|ngengĂŠthshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngengĂŠthrosha|ngengĂŠthrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngengĂŠthmusha|ngengĂŠthmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngengĂŠthyasha|ngengĂŠthyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongengĂŠthnkshĂ«sha|gongengĂŠthnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongengĂŠthnkrosha|gongengĂŠthnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongengĂŠthnkmusha|gongengĂŠthnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongengĂŠthnkyasha|gongengĂŠthnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngongfathasha|ngongfathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngongfathshĂ«sha|ngongfathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngongfathrosha|ngongfathrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngongfathmusha|ngongfathmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngongfathyasha|ngongfathyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongongfathnkshĂ«sha|gongongfathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongongfathnkrosha|gongongfathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongongfathnkmusha|gongongfathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongongfathnkyasha|gongongfathnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
